arts.ttl: Newcastle United in Brazil negotiations – Move welcomed by club’s board
arts.sum: Newcastle United are owned by Saudi Arabia’s Public Investment Fund [PIF] and they are in the process of buying another club. That’s according to Wednesday’s edition of Jornal do Comércio, and they state Newcastle owners are in negotiations to buy Santa Cruz Futebol Clube. arts.sum: Newcastle United predicted XI: Pope; Livramento, Schar, Burn, Hall; Longstaff, Guimaraes, Willock, Gordon, Joelinton, Isak. All eyes will be on the Newcastle United team sheet at 6.15pm tonight to see if Alexander Isak has been passed fit to start against Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah fighting three Liverpool teammates for unprecedented record as vote opens
arts.sum: After an eventful year that saw Jurgen Klopp depart and Arne Slot arrive, four of the Reds squad have been put forward for this year's Fans' Footballer of the Year award - and you can cast your vote now

arts.sum: Manchester City star Rodri has made it clear he’d take the signing of Nico Williams for his club amid the Spanish winger being linked with the likes of Arsenal and Liverpool. arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister admits Real Madrid 'dream' and sends Liverpool contracts message
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister has reiterated he is happy at Liverpool and admitted he wants Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold to sign new contracts with the club

arts.sum: Howe said: "I’m constantly analysing the team to see if there are things we can tweak or change. Eddie Howe has admitted he has held crunch player meetings to try to get to the bottom of Newcastle United's worrying form.

arts.sum: West Ham United and Newcastle United fans won’t be thrilled with how their seasons are going so far.
